title: Scarves
body:
![](https://blob.jortage.com/blobs/5/d4d/5d4d14d96db2e2024d87cf5606cb7ce6421633a002e328947f85d210ba250ecb9f86de8df210dd031be2d4eafb0980494e7a1e8e99590a550abaa42d82768b9f)

Scarves are trinkets which enable cloth-simulated trails behind players that have a gauzy, floaty physics to them.

In order to get started, you craft a Scarf and a Scarf Stapler, and use the Stapler to attach wool blocks or other things to the end of the left and/or right scarf tail.

Or, go ahead and steal a premade pride flag scarf out of the creative menu. There are no scarf police.

Scarves have a theoretical length limit of "whatever won't kill the server". Scarves can be several chunks long. Again, there are no scarf police.
